resources.string:
The OpenJWC team was established to eliminate the final barrier to delivering academic information to students through software development technology. We hope to integrate academic information collection and distribution so that news previously waiting quietly on websites can truly enter the life of every SEUer.

 We reject bloat and pursue "direct access" to information. In the OpenJWC Android client, the Material 3 design language gives the interface agility and purity. Unlike traditional list-piling, we introduced an innovative AI Chat interaction bar—an intelligent assistant that understands SEU. Behind it is a Rust crawler capturing campus dynamics in milliseconds, and a Python backend with a vector database building a smart brain. Whether you ask about "course selection requirements" or "lecture information", the system can locate key points in massive information through semantic search and tell them in natural language.

 As a fully open-source project, we are not just delivering a tool, but inviting every SEU developer to participate and warm campus life with code.

Welcome to OpenJWC (hereinafter referred to as "this product"). This agreement is a legal agreement between you and the OpenJWC developer regarding the use of this product. Please review all terms of this agreement carefully before installing, configuring, or using this product. Once you complete the client configuration or use related services, it means you have fully understood and voluntarily accepted all agreements of this agreement.

 # Article 1 Nature and Scope of Service

 This product is an auxiliary tool that provides academic information aggregation, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) academic Q&A, and news contribution functions for users.

 This product adopts a privatized deployment architecture. The developer only provides software code and technical solutions and does not directly operate the server. The service you connect to is provided by a specific deployer (it could be you personally, a school club, or a third-party organization), and the developer is not responsible for the availability or legality of the services provided by the deployer.

 The name, icon, and copyright of the source code of this product belong to the developer. The user's use of this software does not mean that the developer has transferred any other rights except those specified in the license.

 # Article 2 Account and Service Use Standards

 When users configure server information in the client, they must ensure that the filled BaseURL and account information are accurate and valid.

 Users must not use this product for any illegal activities, including but not limited to crawling sensitive information involving personal privacy, spreading illegal and harmful information, attacking the academic system, etc.

 When contributing news, users should ensure the authenticity, legality, and non-infringement of the content. It is strictly forbidden to publish rumors, slander, inflammatory remarks, or unauthorized copyrighted content.

 Users should properly keep their access credentials. The user shall be responsible for account theft or data leakage caused by improper storage by the user.

 # Article 3 Service Disclaimer

 **Third-party Correlation**: OpenJWC has no official affiliation or cooperation with Southeast University Academic Affairs Office or other school institutions. All information obtained through this product is for reference only. For the final conclusion of academic matters, please refer to the information released by the school's official channels.

 **Service Availability**: Since the academic website may undergo structural adjustments or maintenance, this product cannot guarantee 100% service online rate. The developer shall not be liable for compensation for service interruptions or failure to obtain information caused by force majeure, network fluctuations, or changes in the school system.

 **AI Accuracy**: The AI Q&A function is generated based on existing knowledge bases, and there may be factual deviations or understanding errors. Users must bear the risk for any academic decisions made based on AI replies, and it is recommended to cross-check key information.

 # Article 4 Boundary of Responsibility for Privatized Deployment

 This product is released as an open-source tool following the **MIT License**. The deployer shall bear full responsibility for any legal risks, data compliance issues, and security hazards generated during the use process by the deployer.

 The original developer does not participate in or interfere with the operation and maintenance of the private server. If you believe that the deployer's management behavior has damaged your legal rights during use, please negotiate directly with the administrator of the server or maintain your rights according to relevant legal channels.

 # Article 5 Agreement Amendment and Termination

 The developer has the right to amend this agreement based on changes in laws and regulations or product function upgrades. The updated agreement will be released within the product and take effect immediately. If you continue to use this product after the agreement changes, it is deemed to accept the revised terms.

 # Article 6 Dispute Resolution

 The conclusion, execution, and interpretation of this agreement shall apply to the laws of the People's Republic of China.

 If a dispute occurs between the user and the original developer, it should be resolved through friendly negotiation; if the negotiation fails, either party may file a lawsuit in the people's court with jurisdiction in the developer's location.

 # Article 7 Contact and Feedback

 If you have any questions or suggestions about this agreement, you are welcome to submit feedback through the project's open-source platform. For specific problems such as server operation and data storage, please contact the privatized deployment administrator who provides the service for you.

MIT License
 
 Copyright (c) 2026 OpenJWC
 
 Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
 of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal
 in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights
 to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell
 copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is
 furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:
 
 The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all
 copies or substantial portions of the Software.
 
 THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
 IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
 FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE
 AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER
 LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,
 OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE
 SOFTWARE.
If off, it will be treated as an attachment or external link
Color scheme based on Material You
Username must be at least 3 characters
Please enter a valid email address
Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols
Set how many days after publication news is considered \"fresh\". Fresh news will be highlighted in the list with a badge.
Please enter a valid positive integer
This is a fresh and hot news title
This is an old news title
Are you sure you want to clear all favorites? This action cannot be undone.
Long press a news card to add it to your favorites
Unable to get news labels. Please check your connection or try again later.
News is empty! You found an easter egg… this shouldn\'t happen.
No details available. Please view the original in your browser.
Long press a news card to add attachments
Are you sure you want to unbind device [%1$s]?
Log in to view and manage authorized devices.
If you changed the API Key, please save settings before retrying
Only IPv4 is supported for proxy host
Hint: Ensure the device can access this address and the firewall is configured correctly.
Registration successful, please wait for admin approval
Course already exists at this time: %1$s
Automatically fetch SEU educational system timetable
Switch between different semesters or multiple timetables
Are you sure you want to delete timetable \"%1$s\"? All courses in this timetable will be permanently deleted and cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to remove \"%1$s\" from the timetable?
Time conflict: Please check the periods marked in red.
Tap here to import when you see the timetable
Warning: The total periods (%1$d) is less than the max period of some courses (%2$d). Some courses will be hidden!
Change weeks, period times, and start date
Please select at least one week
No classes today, take a break
Your launcher doesn\'t support shortcut widgets
Add Today\'s Courses Widget to Launcher
If the widget doesn\'t appear, you might need to grant \"Desktop shortcuts\" permission in settings.
Reducing weeks may hide some courses
Extending weeks will affect the range of recurring courses
You have attended %1$d classes this semester, totaling %2$.2f hours
Display specific dates (e.g., 05-01) under the day of the week
Display start and end times below the period number
Display non-current week courses as semi-transparent grey
